description: Prior authorization extraction register for Velo Claim. Public payer documents give prior-authorization requirement rules; Shafafiya/payer transaction data is needed for actual patient authorization status.

records.value: Velo Claim prior authorization extraction register for Daman public billing/adjudication sources + Shafafiya retrieval services.
Rules extracted from the Daman billing index and the CT Abdomen/Pelvis guideline URL supplied by the user. This is not a production payer-contract rulebook.

records.field: Documents indexed from Daman billing page

records.value: Public PDFs tell when PA may be required; actual patient-approved authorization must be retrieved from Shafafiya / payer transaction data.
DoH_Shafafiya_ Web Services Technical definition document V2.pdf

records.codes_mentioned: Exact CPT list not provided in PDF; guideline says ICD and CPT must be highest specificity.
records.applicability_plan_rule: Authorization for CT scan is required for all plans.
records.exceptions: Premier; Thiqa in SEHA providers only.
records.required_evidence_documentation: Medical necessity; prerequisite tests for certain indications; repeat imaging needs strong justification.
records.non_coverage_denial_logic: Visitor plan except medical emergency; screening without signs/symptoms not covered; bundled without/with contrast must use single combined CPT.
records.implementation_status: Ready as MVP rule; missing CPT mapping.
records.source_document: CT scan Abdomen and Pelvis External Guideline V4.0
records.notes_next_action: Add CPT family mapping from licensed CPT/DOH tariff; add plan/provider exception logic.

records.codes_mentioned: HCPCS / DME codes not listed in extracted lines.
records.applicability_plan_rule: Wheelchair services require authorization for all plans; must have DME benefit and policy limit.
records.exceptions: None stated in extracted PA sentence.
records.required_evidence_documentation: Prescribing specialist/consultant must compile and submit documentation for authorization; ordering and performing specialty rules.
records.non_coverage_denial_logic: No DME benefit / visitor plan / duplicate convenience equipment / no illness or injury may reject.
records.implementation_status: Ready as PA rule; missing HCPCS mapping.
records.notes_next_action: Add wheelchair HCPCS code list and DME benefit check.

records.codes_mentioned: HCPCS category; specific code for unspecified orthopedic shoe modification noted but exact code list incomplete.
records.applicability_plan_rule: Authorization-level documentation is required; AUTH-001 denial code confirms prior approval risk.
records.exceptions: Plans without DME benefit are not covered.
records.required_evidence_documentation: For unspecified HCPCS: reason for unspecified code, detailed description, and photograph for authorization only; ordering and performing clinicians in invoice.
records.non_coverage_denial_logic: AUTH-001: prior approval required and not obtained; reject if documentation does not justify HCPCS.
records.implementation_status: Ready with caution; map HCPCS codes.
records.notes_next_action: Treat as PA-required for orthopedic shoe HCPCS until contract matrix confirms.

records.codes_mentioned: CPT podiatry services; HCPCS orthosis/orthopedic shoes.
records.applicability_plan_rule: Authorization is not required for Podiatry services CPTs; HCPCS such as Orthosis and Orthopedic Shoes are subject to pre-approval.
records.exceptions: Podiatry CPTs are no-PA in this guideline.
records.required_evidence_documentation: Anatomic location and systemic conditions must be documented; advanced practice requires evidence of training/competency.
records.non_coverage_denial_logic: Routine foot care without documented systemic disease not medically necessary.
records.notes_next_action: Implement as two rules: no-PA for podiatry CPTs; PA for related orthosis/orthopedic shoe HCPCS.

records.codes_mentioned: OB ultrasound CPT list appears in guideline; exact mapping should be verified.
records.applicability_plan_rule: Eligibility must be obtained before each OB ultrasound. Additional ultrasound after OBUS-001 rejection can be requested through pre-authorization.
records.exceptions: Proven emergency excluded from count and eligibility check requirement.
records.required_evidence_documentation: Previous ultrasound report and detailed documentation supporting medical necessity for additional ultrasound.
records.non_coverage_denial_logic: Not covered without corresponding eligibility or prior authorization except proven emergency; visitor/no maternity benefit not covered.
records.notes_next_action: Model as eligibility-first; only require PA when frequency/trimester rule rejects and medical necessity supports additional ultrasound.

records.codes_mentioned: CPT/procedure code to be supplied on form; exact CPT list not extracted.
records.applicability_plan_rule: Guideline denial code AUTH-001 indicates prior approval required; Daman pre-approval form is mandatory step for Brain Death Diagnosis Confirmation.
records.required_evidence_documentation: Brain death pre-approval form fields: GCS, brainstem reflexes, apnea test, ancillary tests, physician signatures, pregnancy/organ donor/court order details.
records.non_coverage_denial_logic: AUTH-001: prior approval is required and was not obtained.
records.implementation_status: Ready as PA form rule; missing code mapping.
records.source_document: Brain Death Diagnosis Guideline + Brain Death Pre-approval Form
records.notes_next_action: Add service code/CPT and determine whether PA is required for confirmation activities or continuation of coverage.

records.service_procedure_family: Bundled Lymphedema and Lipedema services for Thiqa
records.codes_mentioned: SRVC codes 59-01 to 59-12; CPT examples include 15876, 15877, 15878, 38999 as listed on form.
records.applicability_plan_rule: Pre-Authorization Form for Bundled Lymphedema and Lipedema services for Thiqa; mandatory step to proceed.
records.required_evidence_documentation: Clinical assessment, staging, symptoms, comorbidities, differential diagnosis ruled out, quantitative measures, diagnostic tests, complete decongestive therapy history, surgical intervention details.
records.implementation_status: Ready as PA form rule; validate service codes.
records.source_document: Pre-Authorization Form for Bundled Lymphedema and Lipedema Services for Thiqa
records.notes_next_action: Add exact bundled service definitions for 59-01..59-12 and link to Thiqa plan rules.

records.applicability_plan_rule: Pre-approval form for BMT bundle excluded drugs; mandatory step to proceed.
records.exceptions: Only for excluded drugs from BMT bundle.
records.required_evidence_documentation: Medication name, FDA-labelled diagnosis, dose/duration, admission/discharge dates, prescription copies and lab/medical report results.
records.non_coverage_denial_logic: Missing relevant approval information delays processing.
records.implementation_status: Ready as PA form rule; missing drug list.
records.source_document: BMT Bundle Excluded Drugs Pre-Requisite Form
records.notes_next_action: Add formulary/excluded-drug list and drug coding source.

records.codes_mentioned: Cardiac catheterization CPT families; exact code list not extracted.
records.applicability_plan_rule: Guideline includes AUTH-001 denial code, but extracted policy section does not clearly state the PA trigger.
records.required_evidence_documentation: Medical necessity, ICD/CPT highest specificity, procedure report.
records.non_coverage_denial_logic: AUTH-001: prior approval is required and was not obtained.
records.implementation_status: Needs manual payer confirmation before production.
records.notes_next_action: Do not auto-deny in MVP; flag for manual review until PA matrix/contract confirms exact trigger.

records.why_it_is_missing_risk: Several Daman PDFs mention CPT/HCPCS/SRVC families but do not provide complete production code lists. CPT is also licensed by AMA.
records.what_to_do: Build a controlled code mapping table from licensed CPT/HCPCS, DOH tariff/source, payer contract, and Daman-specific service groups.

records.why_it_is_missing_risk: Public PDFs only state requirement rules. They do not show whether this patient/member already has an approved valid authorization.
records.what_to_do: Connect Shafafiya prior authorization transaction services and payer APIs; ingest PA XML/files into auth_store.

records.why_it_is_missing_risk: Uploaded technical document shows login/pwd service signatures, but credentials and actual environment endpoints are not provided here.
records.what_to_do: Request non-production access: login, password, service URL, facility/caller license, payer/partner license, IP/network allowlist, certificate requirements.

records.why_it_is_missing_risk: The service returns XML descriptions/files; field names for auth_ref, status, member_id, validity dates, service codes need concrete samples.
records.what_to_do: Ask payer/DoH for PA transaction sample packages and XML/XSD; map fields into Velo Claim auth_store.

records.why_it_is_missing_risk: Rules depend on plan type and benefits: Premier, Thiqa, SEHA provider, DME benefit, maternity benefit, visitor plan, policy limits.
records.what_to_do: Use Coverage/FHIR, eligibility response, payer eligibility API, and internal policy/SOB data.

records.why_it_is_missing_risk: Rules depend on SEHA provider status, ordering/performing clinician specialty, and facility license.
records.what_to_do: Normalize provider master data: facility license, network/SEHA flag, clinician specialty, ordering/performing IDs.

records.why_it_is_missing_risk: Rules require ultrasound/X-ray reports, previous imaging, lab reports, photos, CDT history, previous ultrasound reports, etc.
records.what_to_do: Index DocumentReference/attachments and extract evidence with OCR/RAG; create evidence checklist per rule.

records.missing_item: Manual validation of ambiguous PA clues
records.why_it_is_missing_risk: AUTH-001 denial code alone is not enough to prove every service always requires PA.
records.what_to_do: Create review queue for rules with status UNCONFIRMED / AUTH DENIAL CLUE.

records.why_it_is_missing_risk: Daman billing documents update frequently; current page includes 2026 PDFs.
records.what_to_do: Schedule monthly crawler and diff job for Daman billing page and direct PDFs; update rule version history.

records.implementation_detail: Store source_id, payer, title, source_url, document_date, last_checked_at. Seed it with Daman billing page and direct CT PDF.
For each source, download PDF, extract text, page numbers, and screenshots for tables/forms if needed.
Search for terms: authorization, pre-authorization, pre-approval, prior approval, AUTH-001, eligibility/pre-authorization.
Convert snippets to payer_prior_auth_rules with payer, service_family, code system, plan rule, exception, required evidence, non-coverage, source URL.
Review all rules with ambiguous language, especially AUTH-001-only matches such as Cardiac Cath.
Link procedures to CPT/HCPCS/SRVC code ranges. Do not invent CPT codes from PDFs.
Convert prerequisites into checklists: ultrasound required, X-ray required, previous report, lab report, photo, CDT history, etc.
Match claim member_id, payer, service_date, provider/facility, procedure codes/family to auth_ref and status APPROVED with valid dates.
Logic: find rule → apply exceptions → if PA required search auth_store → PASS/FAIL/UNKNOWN with evidence.
Synthetic tests: CT Basic no auth FAIL, CT Premier PASS no PA, CT Thiqa SEHA PASS exception, Wheelchair no auth FAIL, OBUS emergency PASS exception.
Monthly fetch Daman billing page, compare titles/dates/PDF hashes, create review task when changed.

records.purpose_in_velo_claim: Check whether new Prior Request or Prior Authorization transactions are available.
records.how_to_use_in_pipeline: Run first in ingestion job; if new transactions exist, call GetNewPriorAuthorizationTransactions.

records.purpose_in_velo_claim: Get list/XML description of new Prior Request or Prior Authorization transactions not yet downloaded.
records.how_to_use_in_pipeline: Parse XML to identify file IDs and transaction metadata.

records.purpose_in_velo_claim: Advanced search for sent/received transactions, including prior request and prior authorization.
records.key_inputs: transactionID=16 for Prior Request; transactionID=32 for Prior Authorization; status=1 new or 2 downloaded
records.how_to_use_in_pipeline: Use for historical lookup when matching a claim to an existing authorization.

records.service_method: DownloadTransactionFile(login, pwd, fileID, out fileName, out byte[] file, out errorMessage)
records.purpose_in_velo_claim: Download the actual transaction file content.
records.how_to_use_in_pipeline: Store raw file, parse auth_ref/status/validity/procedure/member fields.

records.purpose_in_velo_claim: Mark file as downloaded to avoid repeated ingestion.

records.required_prerequisite_evidence: Ultrasound demonstrates hydronephrosis with inconclusive identification of cause.
records.velo_claim_evidence_check: Find ultrasound report; confirm inconclusive cause.
Find ultrasound report with inconclusive result.

records.required_prerequisite_evidence: Technically limited or inconclusive Doppler ultrasound.
records.velo_claim_evidence_check: Find Doppler ultrasound report; confirm limitation/inconclusive.

records.required_prerequisite_evidence: Persistent clinical symptoms following negative X-rays.
records.velo_claim_evidence_check: Find X-ray report negative + symptoms documentation.

records.required_prerequisite_evidence: Following X-rays or MRI conditions; if MRI contraindicated, evidence-based criteria and documentation required.
records.velo_claim_evidence_check: Find X-ray/MRI report or MRI contraindication and clinical documentation.

records.condition_indication: Suspicion of pelvic bones osteomyelitis or septic arthritis
records.required_prerequisite_evidence: Plain radiograph baseline; if X-ray inconclusive and high suspicion remains.
records.velo_claim_evidence_check: Find baseline radiograph and high suspicion note.

records.required_prerequisite_evidence: Worsening or suspected liver enlargement unexplained through ultrasound.
records.velo_claim_evidence_check: Find ultrasound report and unexplained/worsening liver enlargement.

records.required_prerequisite_evidence: Unknown cause following ultrasound with focal lesion.
records.velo_claim_evidence_check: Find lab ALT/AST + ultrasound focal lesion.

records.required_prerequisite_evidence: Acute biliary obstruction level/cause not identified by ultrasound and/or suspected complication.

records.description: CT Abdomen/Pelvis, Wheelchair, Orthopedic Shoes, etc.
Code list/range or linked mapping id.
Premier, Thiqa in SEHA providers, emergency, etc.

records.meaning: Documents on Daman billing page as of extraction.
